headline: ServiceNow (NOW) and IBM Announce Expanded Collaboration
summary: ServiceNow, Inc. (NYSE:NOW) is one of the best trending AI stocks to watch in 2026. ServiceNow, Inc. (NYSE:NOW) and IBM announced on June 11 an expanded collaboration to address two of the most significant barriers blocking enterprise AI at scale. These include the AI-ready data problem and the legacy application layer. Management stated that the […]
